title: Real gundams, top 3D generator, open-source world models, ChatGPT updates, new TTS: AI NEWS
summary: AI Search covers a wide range of recent AI releases including 3D generation tools (Pixal3D, AsymFlow), world models (Sana-WM), language models (MiniCPM), creative tools (Krea2, Just Dub it), and ChatGPT finance features. The video aggregates demos and links to 20+ new AI tools and products across vision, audio, robotics, and software engineering domains.
